# Extracao: transcription_docx_02-Breadcrumb_Trail

- **Fonte:** transcription_docx_02-Breadcrumb_Trail.txt
- **Tipo:** TXT
- **Tamanho:** 0.01 MB

---

Breadcrumb Trail Emails

The purpose of these email is to create an excitement and anticipation for your event but also keep consistent reminders and event information transparent and close by. You can also use these as a platform to get to know your attendees/market better by adding surveys, questions, etc. 



Below are a few samples we have used in the past but be sure to make your own and place your own brand, style and marketing techniques on each! 





Sample Email #1 – confirmation & preparation 



Subject: You’re Seats Are Saved! 



Hi NAME, 



That's great to hear you are planning to join us for the amazing two-day Future Proof Deal Lab. Thank you for letting me know via your rsvp! I now have ONE/TWO seats saved for you to attend the amazing 2 day Future Proof Deal Lab with Matt Larson and Dean Graziosi. 



Please verify that the below information is correct for your tickets: 

Attendee Name 

Attendee Email 

Attendee Phone 

Attendee Address 

Guest Information

AYTHING else you may need ☺ 

In order to make sure this is one of the most impactful events of your year so we want you to be as prepared as possible! You can do this by checking off the three items below: 

Please be sure you bring your laptop/tablet/phone to be able to work on during the training and action step portions of the event. 

If you haven't started yet please begin going through the Pre-Deal Lab Training in the OBM back office. We will be touching on these items at the event but the more you know the better ahead you will be ;) 

Mention in an email any serious food allergies or restrictions asap so we can accommodate!! 

If you need anything else please let me know! 

We’ll be in touch soon with some awesome sneak peaks of the event so be sure to keep an eye on your email weekly so you don’t miss out!! 

See you soon :) 





Sample Email #2 – congratulations! 



Subject: Message From Dean! 



Hi NAME, 

We are officially 4 weeks away from the 2-day Future Proof Deal Lab! Where you will join Matt Larson and Dean Graziosi on an amazing journey of knowledge and training unlike any other. 

Dean and our team wanted to send you a personal message saying Congratulations! You’ve taken a huge step with us and we couldn’t be more excited for you to see all of the plans we have made for you to experience here in Scottsdale! 

Here is an audio message from Dean JUST FOR YOU! (Insert Link)

Don’t forget- another HUGE piece to your membership and attendance is meeting some of your fellow attendees. We have created a special platform just for you to reach out, network, share experiences and celebrate in your triumphs. You can join the Organized Brilliance Facebook Group today by CLICKING HERE! 

If you have any questions about the event please feel free to reach out to us. 

See you soon :) 



Sample Email #3 - sneak peak 



Subject: Who Is Going To Be There?!



Hi NAME, 



WOW!!! Do we have some awesome things planned for you here in Scottsdale. In 3 weeks not ONLY will you share a room with: 



Dean Graziosi – author, investor, entrepreneur, and trainer. 

Matt Larson – active real estate investor, successful entrepreneur, and trainer. 



But there’s MORE!!! We also have some amazing surprise speakers, trainers and coaches coming in just to make sure you have all of the experience and perspectives you need IN ONE ROOM!



They’ll teach you the strategies and capabilities to make sure you leave this event with all the tools to reach your next goals! 

Your Team Leader will also give you ANOTHER support system when you have questions. 

(You can reveal these speakers if you want – give their social media information as well so they can get to know them) 

If you need anything else please let me know! (OR enter your information website here – this is a sample for our Edge event) 

See you soon :) 



Sample Email #4 - how to prepare 



Subject: A Must DO before!  



Hi NAME, 



The countdown is ON!!! Only 2 weeks until you are here, in Dean's personal office masterminding and learning from some of the most amazing Real Estate trainers!!! 



To prepare for the event please take a look below! We would love to get to know YOU better so we can best prepare for the event and give you the most amazing chance at making this work for you! 



Before answering the questions, please login to your OBM back office by clicking the link. Then go through module 1 of the Pre-Deal Lab Training one last time! - This will help you prepare to answer. 



LINK HERE!



What is your personal why? --Why do you get up and do what you do everyday?(Don't be afraid to dig deep)

Why Real Estate?  --What made you interested in real estate investing? 

What sparked that drive to learn? (This can also be apart of your why)

What strategy / strategies are you currently working?

Deals to date? And what state you are investing in? (If you have no deals that is perfectly fine and the deal lab will help you move forward)

What do you feel like is your biggest obstacle right now?

Where do you see your real estate business 1 year from now?

Anything else that you would like us to know about you, please include! The more we know, the better we can assist in understanding where you want to go and helping you get closer to your goals!

Last but not least if you could also attach your favorite photo to this email.--  It can be a selfie, a picture with your family, or with your pet, etc.-Whatever picture you feel you would like to share with us (:

Please email this back to me as soon as possible, this 

See you soon!!! 



Sample Email #5 - Reminder  



Subject: Countdown is On!  



Hi NAME, 

The single digit countdown is ON!!! We will see you in less than 8 days – woohoo!!! 

The 2-day Future Proof Deal Lab is getting so close!!! 

In order to make sure you are prepared for the event there are a few things below to check off before you attend 



Booked Flight & Hotel Accommodations 

Join the private OBM Facebook

Gone through the Pre Deal Lab Training in your OBM back office 

Packed, your laptop/tablet/phone for the event 

Told Dean’s team about any serious food allergies 



If you need anything else please let me know! 



Just a few reminders 

See you soon :) 



Sample Email #6 - See you tomorrow!  



Subject: See You Tomorrow! 



Hi NAME, 



We can’t wait to see you tomorrow! Just a reminder we will begin promptly tomorrow so don’t be late! Below is the schedule of events for you to prepare for and we will have tea and coffee available to keep you alert all event long! 

Schedule: 

DEAN GRAZIOSI'S OFFICE:

ADDRESS HERE

 

Saturday, February 9th, 2019

         Check-in: 8:00am-8:30am

Training: 8:30am-5:30pm (Lunch & Snacks provided)

 

Sunday, February 10th, 2019

Training: 8:30am-5:30pm (Lunch & Snacks provided)

Don’t Forget to arrive ready to have fun, be coachable, push yourself and play FULL OUT!  

See you in the morning :)
